HomeDestinationsLebong
West Bengal

Lebong

Valley of the Rising Sun

Rolling emerald tea gardens catching golden light, the aroma of fresh leaves on mountain breeze.

4.3
(78 reviews)
Darjeeling, West Bengal
mountainsnatureculturetrekking
19°C
Partly Cloudy
Explore

Overview

Introduction

Lebong is a beautiful valley near Darjeeling, known for its racecourse, tea gardens, and breathtaking sunrises. A peaceful retreat away from the tourist crowds.

History

Lebong was the site of the first tea plantation in Darjeeling and houses the world's highest racecourse.

Altitude

1,800 m

Best Time

October to May

Temperature

Summer: 15-25°C | Winter: 2-10°C

Location

Darjeeling, West Bengal

Weather

Pleasant throughout the year

Summer

15-25°C

Winter

2-10°C

Monsoon

18-22°C

Gallery

Nearby Attractions

Unique

Lebong Racecourse

The highest racecourse in the world.

Heritage

Happy Valley Tea Estate

One of the oldest tea estates in Darjeeling.

KuboVista

Lebong Cemetery

A quiet colonial-era cemetery with historical graves.

Why visit: Historical significance and peace

Viewpoints

sunrise

Lebong Sunrise Point

Watch the first rays illuminate Kanchenjunga.

Local Cuisine

Must-Try Dishes

MomosThukpaAloo DumSel RotiChhurpi Soup

Restaurants

Valley View Restaurant

4.1

Indian & Chinese • ₹300-500

Overlooks the tea gardens.

Cafes

Tea Lounge

4.5

Specialty: Darjeeling Tea

Taste the finest Darjeeling teas.

Street Food

Momo Stall at Main Market

Freshly steamed and fried momos with spicy chutney

Thukpa Corner

Hot noodle soup with local vegetables and meat

Shopping

Tea Outlet

Directly purchase fresh tea from the estate.

First Flush TeaGreen TeaTea accessories

Culture & Festivals

Culture

Rich Himalayan culture with Buddhist monasteries and Nepali traditions.

LosarBuddha JayantiDashainTihar

Adventure Activities

Tea Garden Walk

Easy

Guided walk through Happy Valley Tea Estate.

2 hrs
₹500

Suggested Itineraries

Activities

  • • Racecourse visit
  • • Tea garden walk
  • • Sunrise point
Tea tasting, Lunch
Taxi from Darjeeling
N/A
₹1,500

How to Reach

train

Nearest railway station is New Jalpaiguri (NJP)

~3 hrs drive
₹150-500

flight

Nearest airport is Bagdogra (IXB)

~2.5 hrs drive
₹3,000-8,000

bus

Direct buses from Siliguri and Darjeeling

~3-4 hrs
₹200-400

car

Private taxis and shared jeeps available

~2.5 hrs
₹2,500-4,000

Nearby Railway

New Jalpaiguri Junction (NJP) - 72 km

Nearby Airport

Bagdogra Airport (IXB) - 78 km

Taxi Fare

Shared: ₹150-200, Private: ₹2,500-3,500

Bike Rental

₹500-800/day (Royal Enfield/Scooty)

Frequently Asked Questions

October to May offers clear skies and pleasant weather.
